nodes.name: Code — Prepare Domain Extraction Batch
nodes.notes: Collapses N signal items into ONE item containing all titles+URLs as a numbered list. Runs once for all items (default Code node mode). The single output item feeds the OpenRouter HTTP node so we make exactly one LLM call per WF1 execution regardless of signal volume.

nodes.name: HTTP — OpenRouter Extract Domains
nodes.notes: Same OpenRouter credential as WF4/WF5 (httpHeaderAuth named 'OpenRouter'). Sends all signal titles as one numbered batch. response_format json_object prevents markdown wrapping. temperature:0 for deterministic extraction. max_tokens:800 gives headroom for 50+ signals (each domain ~15 chars).

nodes.name: Code — Attach Extracted Domains
nodes.notes: Re-expands the single OpenRouter response back into N signal items. Merges the LLM-extracted domain onto each original signal row. Drops rows where domain is still empty (unidentifiable signals). Returns empty array if nothing was extractable — Sheets Append node safely skips.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ("net revenue retention" OR "NRR") ("earnings" OR "investor letter" OR "10-K") (company OR saas OR revenue)
